ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Continued To Jun-05-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BUILD GROUP, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer is overruled. The demurrer was filed untimely, as defendant's reply effectively concedes. In any event, the demurrer would have been ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, the first sentence of which requires a meet-and-confer "[b]efore filing a demurrer." Here the demurrer was filed March 6, 2024 and the purported meet-and-confer was March 12, 2024. (Delbridge Dec. 2:22-23.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
